title: Department Manager Vacancy at Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises:
Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
